description: A curator decision record linking a app.smellgate.perfumeSubmission to its outcome. Written by the curator account only.

submission.description: The app.smellgate.perfumeSubmission this resolution applies to.

decision.description: Curator's decision. approved = a new canonical perfume was published; rejected = the submission is not going to be added; duplicate = an existing canonical perfume already covers it.

perfume.description: Set when decision is "approved" or "duplicate"; points at the canonical app.smellgate.perfume record the submission resolved to.

note.description: Curator's explanation, shown to the submitter.
